Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x37F0 "PROTECTOR-RABBIT-37F0" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Protector (Rabbit Software) (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Dumped from $0334 as the game checks that $0342 = $54 in order for it to start.
